headline: Dr. Grinny McChompers Warns Excessive Laughing Causes 'Giggle Cavities'
summary: Dentists recommend daily sarcasm for tooth health.
fullBody: Dr. Grinny McChompers released a study linking joy to dental disasters. 'Too much happiness rots the enamel,' he chuckled grimly. Patients are now prescribed frown exercises and reality TV marathons.
